productDescription: Frithly is a B2B lead intelligence and outbound research service for founders, SDR teams, small sales teams, early-stage SaaS companies, and B2B service businesses. We help customers improve outbound prospecting by delivering researched target accounts, relevant decision-maker contacts, company-fit context, buying and intent signals, and personalized outreach angles.
